rationale: Raw ligand dictionary uses ligand_resn as the PDB HETATM residue/code column
downstream_effect: M13D parser must read ligand_resn before fallback guesses

rationale: Most HETATM records are water, ions, crystallization additives, modified residues, or artifacts
downstream_effect: HETATM presence alone must never upgrade evidence class

rationale: Primary/rank-1 reference remains the main automated rulebook anchor
downstream_effect: Primary ligand/cofactor context gets separate one-row-per-protein table

rationale: Supporting references can reveal holo/cofactor context but do not override primary
downstream_effect: Supporting ligand/cofactor context gets separate four-row-per-protein table

rationale: Supporting ligand/cofactor evidence must not automatically override primary/rulebook class
downstream_effect: Add notes/flags only; final interpretation remains cautious

rationale: AFSP models are predicted structures and do not contain experimental crystallographic ligands
Water is not functional ligand support
If HETATM exists but only water/additives/manual ions remain, classify as apo-like/no biological ligand context
downstream_effect: Prevents 1poi CU/HOH from being falsely treated as holo support

rationale: Metals can be catalytic, structural, crystallization-related, or nonspecific
downstream_effect: ZN/CU/MN/CA/NA/NI/HG fallback to metal/ion manual context unless explicitly curated

rationale: NAP/PLP/MGD/MO/SF4 and similar dictionary-supported cofactors count as biological support
downstream_effect: Positive support only when curated dictionary/fallback class marks it biological

rationale: SO4/PO4/NES/NO2/NO3 and similar context-dependent ligands do not support function alone
downstream_effect: Record as manual context; no automatic upgrade

rationale: MSE/GOL/EDO/PEG/BME and crystallization additives do not support functional inference
If primary is apo/no biological ligand but supporting PDB has curated biological ligand, record a supporting holo-context note
downstream_effect: Do not override primary; mark POTENTIAL_SUPPORTING_HOLO_CONTEXT

rationale: If supporting PDB path is missing, keep Foldseek hit as unresolved audit evidence
downstream_effect: No ligand scan claim is made

rationale: Old Pilot32 outputs may contain incomplete or over-specific assumptions
downstream_effect: Use old outputs as calibration, not unquestioned truth

rationale: Viral-contig encoded proteins may diverge from bacterial/PDB references
downstream_effect: Do not penalize partial motif/ligand context automatically
